title: Athyrium pseudoarboreum
intro: Athyrium pseudoarboreum, also known as the lady fern or tree fern, is a perennial plant species belonging to the fern family (Athyriaceae). The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Athyrium pseudoarboreum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Athyrium pseudoarboreum is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat respiratory issues, as well as to promote digestive health and alleviate menstrual cramps.
